name: SPASE DEFENSE
short_description: Stranded on a far flung planet, hold out for rescue against alien foes with a variety of guns, lasers, and explosives.
detailed_description:
Trapped on an alien world, your last hope of escape is an old rescue beacon. Its immense glow can be detected from great distances, but it can also bring unwanted attention...

SPASE DEFENSE is a 2D, wave-based arena shooter. Each playthrough, survive against randomized hordes of enemies and bosses with up to 4 players.

Key Features

  • Survive alone or with up to 4 players in local co-op.
  • 30+ weapons and items to unlock.
  • 40+ unique foes to discover and fight.
  • Spice up gameplay with different modes such as Randomizer, Boss Rush, and more!
